channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Could always be worse — 56 replies — 224.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Could always be worse

Open thread • Replies: 56 • Updated: 2026-07-03 21:19 UTC

OP

You could be a German wagie.

>no more AC
>no more sick leave

These are the early signs of a collapsing country. Just wait until the food riots hit.

Early replies (first 3)

62438577
former Blackrock manager is chancellor now, imagine.

62438607
>>62438545
Do you have to send this shit to govt? What if the employer doesn’t give a shit is someone going to audit this?

62438687
>>62438607
If this is anything like Germany's neighbouring country that I live in then the doctor sends it to the government when he inputs it into the system, and then it goes to your employer automatically from there so he knows whether to honour it or not.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62440179
>>62438789
b00t
>>62438870
also b0t
>>62438917
still b0000t
>>62438929
what if you were a butterfly
>>62438968
thats communist
bots, we deserve bettter

62440228
>>62440179
Mediocre bait, here's what (You) desperately crave

62440552
>>62438545
Oooooooo wagie

62440561
boomer pensions need to be paid

62440631
>>62438545
>These are the early signs of a collapsing country
can you give an example of a country that collapsed because they wanted doctor's notes for sick leave?

62440641
>>62438770
>The problem with most of these "far right" parties, are that they have quasi-leftist economic policies.
Like the Danish People Party which happens to be the most effective anti immigration party of all time

62440666
>>62438545
there's free food and shelter in the military. time to suit up for israel!

62440717
i don't remember the last time i called in sick, but if the popular thing is to have stricter rules and it will make people stop voting for afd so they get less money to plaster their hideous faces everywhere, i'm all for it. i don't care about politics, but there must be a requirement for afd members to be disfigured in some way

62440944
>get flu
>can barely get out of bed and best thing for you is rest
>Have to drag yourself outside while in pain, prolonging your recovery.

How does this make sense?

62441057
NET
ZERO
LMFAO

62441097
>>62438545
U vill vork to pay ze Toorks

62441112
>>62438545
>no more sick leave

>Hello doctor I have a headache and can't go to work.
>sure thing. Stay home for the rest of the week.

62441324
>>62438545
Kek how the fuck would needing a doctors certificate at the first day of illness ”improve competitiveness”? Europe didn’t need this kind of american slave shit to be able to compete before. What a retarded rule that will get abolished fast.

>>62438690
It’s funny how even in white countries we get retards like you who are easily fooled into letting foreign agents run your country.

62441365
>>62438545
German wagies are literally the biggest milking cow in the world. Reminder if you include every tax, from forced tv tax (even if you dont have a tv) to VAT, to social taxes you and your employee has to make, from 100 Euro earned around 33 remain. Fucking crazy.

62441372
>>62441324
>>62438744
You know Merz is the foreign agent? No?

62441375
>>62441365
yet the gubberment and companies wonder why nobody wants to wörk anymore......!

62441387
>>62439638
>>62440561
Yeah this is the Moment german boomers retire (60s had really a lot of kids here) and all the brown experts who came here will pay them their pension. Its really a master plan. It will work beautifully? I know the economy did not grow since 7 years but any moment now it will turn around. Maybe more tax on energy and we can go.

62441401
>>62441375
Yeah im hoping this spirals out of control for them. It has the potential
1.extreme high taxes and extreme high energy costs with absurd regulation
2.production shuts down, real wages get lower fast and competent young people leave
3.government refuses to cut spending effectively and cut regulation (thats a given the sytem is too entrenched, has to increase taxes even more, and inflation increases aswell
4.first point intensifying

62441402
>>62441372
The truth is they're all foreign agents. Wasn't Merkel ex-Stasi or something like that? AfD isn't the answer because they're just more of the same wearing the mask of being something different.

62441424
>>62441401
I would tell you Ivan to go away but i know you’re exactly at the right place if you want to turn retards against their own country and continent.

62441427
>>62438545
Isn't germany's woes due to getting rid of their nuclear reactors which are the only source of reliable energy that isn't a scam?

62441433
>>62438545
Germans a generally insufferable and completely brainwashed regarding their glorious past. 12 years not a slave.

62441451
>>62441402
>everyone is in on it!
While mostly true there comes a point where there are enemy factions.
Otherwise we would already have a world gov.
Anglosphere still bows to england and so does russia, japan and china.

62441472
>>62441451
Yeah and AfD with it’s obvious russian backing is an enemy faction, no matter how much it claims to be against immigrants and wokeism.

62441478
>>62438545
but i am
and -40% ytd
and fat
and no gf

62441575
>>62441375
For decades we've had this system and everyone was happy. The problem is that the economy is failing because German is very reliant on cheap energy which we've chosen to avoid ever since the ukraine war. If we had pivoted hard into manufacturing renewables or simply having kids we'd be fine.

>>62441427
The reactors we had weren't very good. Nowadays everyone is pro-nuclear because they're thinking of reactor types that weren't even conceptualized 10 years ago. Our problems are that we were reliant on cheap energy which we didn't bother producing and that we have no kids.

62442429
>>62441424
>>62441472
Just fuck off you retard. My relatives even fought against Russia in ww2. I bet YOU are the one not German, or what's your religion I wonder? Let me guess "atheism with Jewish family"? See >>62438768
And don't forget the government is the one prioritizing foreign interests.

62442433
>>62441478
Oooofff at least it's Friday.

62442461
>>62438545
That’s why I let myself be fired, collected unemployment and fucked off. Retarded country full of retarded autism max robots.

62443834
>>62440944
It would be a shame if you coughed into your hands and touched as many public surfaces as possible on the way to the doctor's.

item.title: /BBBY/ - Larry Cheng went onto Theppshow edition — 56 replies — 224.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
/BBBY/ - Larry Cheng went onto Theppshow edition

Open thread • Replies: 56 • Updated: 2026-07-03 21:18 UTC

OP

>rc buys 7,780,000 shares of BBBY, and $60-$80 strike calls worth 1,670,100 shares in March 2022

>rc sells shares and calls of BBBY in august 2022

>rc has a sitdown with a famous corporate raider, Carl Icahn in october 2022

>rc offers 400 million for BBBY in December 2022

>pitchbook (best M&A software suite in the world, costing 5 figures + per year) lists BBBY(now known as BBBYQ or DK-Butterfly-1) as sold via a leveraged buyout on January 13 2023

>a default on the ABL with JPM happened on the same day that pitchbook shows a leveraged buyout, the terms of that ABL specify that a default is triggered if a change of control happens, a change of control is defined as an acquisition of 40% or more of the voting power by any person or group.

>one month later, February 2023 RC tweets “someone tell the government to stop shooting down my balloons”, alluding to bad actors delaying the Bed Bath m&a

>the GameStop CEO then became a BBBYQ chapter 11 creditor and debtor

>Larry cheng (who helped RC build Chewy, and is a current boardmember at GameStop, and a close personal friend to RC) went onto theppshow podcast (which is dedicated to BBBY recovery theories) 8 months after BBBY filed for chapter 11, and 2 months after shares were cancelled

>OverStock - who is the most famous company to battle illegal naked shorts, who even released a crypto dividend 5 years ago - purchased the BBBY IP, and owns 55% of TZero - the only approved blockchain entity who can issue debt instruments and securities

>OverStock - whos now traded under ticker BBBY - has issued warrants with dates that match GME's warrants, and with a CUSIP-6 that matches BBBYQ's CUSIP-6, proving BBBYQ has already begun m&a activity with BBBY


REQUIRED READING: bbbwhy.com

>Larry Cheng and Bill Pulte have gone onto theppshow podcast

jake2b started a youtube channel to access quality BBBYQ easier than scrolling twitter posts:

https://www.youtube.com/@jake2b

previous thread:
>>62417410

Early replies (first 3)

62438274
>Larry Cheng was inside the PP show

62438733
Good morning my beautiful Towelkings.

62438734
uh... guys... you might want to check your accounts...

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62441798
>>62441320
Yup. We gonna be kangs.
>and billionares<

62441800
>>62441565
Pretty sure fraud payouts are NOT taxed. But someone can correct me.

62441804
>>62441800
Ive checked a few times and arrived at the conclusion they are taxed. We be amazing to roll everything into gme though

62441869
>>62441800
When you get a fraud payout the IRS pays you 50%

62441988
>>62441800
it wont be officially labelled as fraud settlement.

62442185
>>62441544

62442189
>>62442185
Isn't that a BILLIONAIRE? Why is he talking about the CUSIP Conundrum?

62442681
>>62442189
>he’s on the list for the $GABBBYQ GAPE

62442725
GET FUCKING READY BECAUSE WERE GOING TO MAKE IT WERE ALL GOING TO MAKE IT!!!

62442960
>>62442725
>>62441611
>>62441544
>>62441346

I hate you SO fucking much, Alex. I need you to intimately know this fact so that when you're sitting in that citric acid bath in that Baltimore warehouse, slowly cooking through your degloved dick, hands, and feet, watching me fuck your wife, you'll know why it's happening to you and that no screaming, begging or haggling will save you from the rusted cauldron you will ultimately die in.

Yea yea...muh "why do they hate alex", "youre not him", etc. etc..
Fuck you nigger.

62442967
But yea....
WAGMI bobbies!!!!!

62442975
not obsessed btw

62442981
>>62442975
Everywhere they look they see him.

62442986
>im not him
lol
nigger(s)

62442997
>>62442960
Total Towel Triumph

62443002
>>62442960
PPseeds is important to the bbbyq community. Weird that you hate him so much, especially since he is friends with Bill Pulte.

62443011
>>62443002
>PPseeds is important to the bbbyq community. Weird that you hate him so much, especially since he is friends with Bill Pulte.
>cmon bro dont cook me in a cauldron in baltimore
>doing the EXACT thing I said you would do

LMFAO !!!
M
F
You mean nothing to the community nigger !
A
O
WAGMI !!!

62443025
shills in shambles

62443041
BBBYQ CONGRATULATIONS CLASS 9

62443078
Queen PP will be holding a gathering this weekend at the holiday inn, check PP x account for invite lists

62443090
>>62443078
It will be quite the "merger" if you know what I mean

62443203
>>62443078

62443244
WAGMI

62443367
Why such satirical vitriol against the host of a podcast that was frequented by the director of national intelligence? Even Larry Cheng went on once. Looks like it was a way for LC and Pulte to signal under a cover of plausible deniability. Wallstreet seethed so hard they had main Reddit admins shutdown /r/theppshow. Doug cifu spilled his spaghetti so hard he was force retired and banned from hockey involvement because he seethed so hard about an obscure internet bbbyq recovery theory community. Then accounting for RC’s ties with bbbyq, there is a stampede of elephants in the room at this point that bot swarms and paid stock bashers insist are all irrelevant and offtopic or nothingburgers if you try to mention them.

Interesting times.

62443473
not reading any of that
fuck anyone that is not rc or rk especially hooked nosed jewtubers

WAGMI !!!!

62443510
>>62443367
I trust PP's DD

62443710
>>62443510
I trust Mrs PP’s DD’s too

62443712
>>62443367
>Larry Cheng came inside Queen PP

62443770
>>62443712

62443832
>>62443770
What a great guy he is

62443228

62443466
>>62442764
Don't worry, bobro, the market is VERY long. They are going to punish bulls.

62443506
>>62442764

It will fail like all the others.

62443529
Are you all genuinely retarded? It's a three day trading weekend. When all markets are otherwise closed there is lower volume and the bots can wash trade the price up. Then Saylor can dump you next week.

62443719
EMERGENCY 63.2k IS VULNERABLE
MUMU HAS ASSUMED DIRECT CONTROL

>>62443529
Not all markets are from the usa.

62443790

easy bros
the $20k is programmed

OP

how does this make you feel?

62437581
i'm gonna buy 15000 LINK for the lols for $1

62437627
>>62437481
Idk how you do it mate. Was only accumulating starting 6/2025 and I got a little overexcited. Realized 20k in losses selling 4k Stinkies at 9-10 buckeroos and left 1k suicide stack. I look at it as I saved 10-20k more by pulling out when I did. I was about to start DCA’ing but ima wait for the false flag and flash crash to really slurp

62438843
>>62437481
We will get rich inshallah brother. I have been praying for link all day everyday. Just keep your faith brother.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62440258
>>62437481
makes me hope you're following every movement Chainlink makes so you don't lose hope.

62441377
>>62437481

62443206

62443322

62443334

62443347

62443744

>1 avg

item.title: Trump fucked you — 28 replies — 31.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
Trump fucked you

Open thread • Replies: 28 • Updated: 2026-07-03 20:37 UTC

OP

>His annual disclosure for 2025 with the US Office of Government Ethics, disclosed that Trump made $636 million in royalties from CIC Digital, LLC, a company that issues $TRUMP, a crypto token that he launched three days before taking office for his second term. Almost all of the come came in the form of royalties from a license agreement with Celebration Coins. Trump's meme coin reached its peak value of $74.24 within a day of launching. On Tuesday evening, its price was $1.67, down 98% since inception.

>The president also reported almost $600 million in income from token sales by World Liberty Financial, a cryptocurrency company backed by the president and his family, and around $65 million from equity sales in the firm that controls World Liberty Financial. Another $196 million in equity sales of Stablecoin Holdco LLC are also listed. A crypto firm and issuer of tokens, World Liberty Financial was launched during the 2024 presidential campaign. It was co-founded by the president, his sons Eric and Donald Jr. and Zack and Alex Witkoff, the sons of U.S. special envoy and longtime Trump friend Steve Witkoff.

Eternal aristocratic levels of wealth were transferred from plebs directly to Trump's family via shitcoin scams.

Early replies (first 3)

62433591
>>62433580
>Zack and Alex Witkoff, the sons of U.S. special envoy and longtime Trump friend Steve Witkoff.
I recently learned what background this family has. I was naive to think Witkoff wasnt.....
>>>62433555

62433599
>>62433580
>>62433591
Imagine his sons short when he is cooperating with the cz cartel 1 minute before his retarded tweets and cex dumps! Its just the top of the (((berg)))

62433604
>>62433599
But you know something something in the casino.....

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62433618
>>62433580
LMAO CRYPTO KEKS FUCKED IN THE ASS ONCE AGAIN
HOW MANY UNLUBED COCKS HAVE YOU TAKEN IN YOUR ASS NOW?
FOUR... FIVE HUNDRED? MAYBE SIX HUNDRED?
GET RAPED IN YOUR SAGGY BUTTHOLE CRYPTO KEKS

62433624
>>62433618
If you missed out in the past you can still buy in around 55k(u wont)

62433629
>>62433618
Only the most retarded of retards bought and holded TRUMP coin after the first day.

62433632
>>62433629
on any day.

62433672
>>62433632
I STILL mad i did not buy at the first hours, i saw some /biz/ thread but it wasnt clear that it was real and i was tried. Would have been at fucking 5 Dollar. I of course would have aggressively sold the way up and dumped all at lower then 50. Would have made so much money. So no, people buying at the first day to dump high were not dumb.

62433743
>>62433672
You would have bought at $7 and sold at $2.58.
Trumpenberg would be thankful for your contribution (he wouldn't be).

62433763
>>62433580
So the crypto president and his retarded sons finally killed crypto for good. They should probably shutdown WLFI and their mining and treasury companies at this point. Nobody will ever invest with this scumbags again

62433764
>>62433599
I look forward to the years-long imbroglio of the next administration investigating all of their financial crimes

62433798
>>62433763
Ohboi, are you new to this planet? The 30iq hillbilly niggers ll never learn,

62433862
He had 6b when he entered office, these numbers are nothing, would have made more holding spy

62433864
>>62433580
Nobody cares, amerigolems will defend this no matter how bad the corruption and decay gets because they get to pretend they're winning the (((culture war))) that the yids manufactured to win no matter what.

62433948
>>62433864
Name 1 eu politician less corrupt than trump

62433962
>>62433580
Yeah it’s disgusting I definitely regret voting for him in some ways. And even though I didn’t actually buy any of his shitcoins, I still paid for it because it sucked all the liquidity up and then he dumped on everyone, cratering the entire market and single handedly wrecking the bull run. Then he wrecked it again with tariffs. Then he wrecked it again with the Iran war. I don’t think I’ll be voting again. Fuck the government.

62433974
>>62433618
After you hit the wall, unlubed cock inside you doesn’t even make you cry out loud.

62435237
>>62433618
>>62433974
these are strangely visceral and unnecessarily erotic posts. are you anons speaking from experience????? never bought these coins btw, just don't get why anons are speaking like this

62435296
>>62433580
I voted for this

62436883
you lost tranny

62436896
/biz/ fucked me not trump
I've had several winning plays the last 18 months and each time I was fudded out by retards on this board
It made me realize I can't listen to you morons because you have no clue what is going on.

62436905
>>62433672
It was fucking listed on solana, I don't use solana. Sucks.

62436906
>>62433580
yeah but it has nothing to do with the market performance of crypto. trump family crypto holdings are taking open market losses just like every other bagholder here. this is the classic trump play of royalty & licensing.

62437518
>>62433580
How are his cultists spinning this?

62437570
>>62436896
Most of the posters here are penniless 3rd world browns giving bad advice on purpose because they think it's funny.

62440880
>>62433580
The crypto president lol

62441152
>>62433580
When is he and his crooked family getting charged for this?

62443718
>>62433580
>>62433618
Now the news are he also bought stocks the day before he eased tariffs. Its just comial self enrichment
>>62433743
NO I WOULDNT
I would have sold ALL the way up, in fact im always selling early and after x3 i for sure would have takenout initials and at 30 i would have sold most. Damn.
>>62436905
Same but it was instantly listed on kucoin and i think i had 2k there.....

OP

I found sub 1 million marketcap token with 100k liquidity. All verified not a scam as well as they just got a CASP license from Europe which some top exchanges couldn’t not acquire. How bullish is this?

yess saaar very boolish many jupiters

62442952
yes as well all know all cryptos will all go up and they will all get adopted as currency
the central banks are seething

62442959
>>62442952

62442972
>>62442962

62442993

62443027

I will not tell you the token. Your reverse psychology won’t work on me

62443102
>>62443027
but saaaaar my village needs this

62443750
>>62442930

item.title: There is no point investing in the stock market if you dont already have a lot of money Doing small buys into the market… — 8 replies — 10.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
There is no point investing in the stock market if you dont already have a lot of money Doing small buys into the market…

Open thread • Replies: 8 • Updated: 2026-07-03 20:42 UTC

OP

There is no point investing in the stock market if you dont already have a lot of money

Doing small buys into the market in the hope you have a nest egg in your late 60's is retarded as fuck

>inbefore: YoU mUsT bE a ZoOomeR

Im almost 40. I built shit and made millions in 20s and 30s. It was only when I had over $5M liquid did I start putting my money in the markets.

You're all retarded as fuck for investing when you have like 50k to ur name, absolute massive cock fuck shit waste of time, go take that 50k and BUILD SOMETHING that makes you 500k to 5M in the next few years instead of waiting around like a fucking moron waiting 40 years for it to compound there to 500k.... because 500k in 40 years will be fucking piss shit dick nothing, you dumb faggot

bitch

pic related: me everytime i hear people telling people who are FUCKING POOR to put money in the markets "even just a lil bit counts" - NO IT FUCKING DOESNT LOL

Early replies (first 3)

62443219
>>62443208
elite s tier high iq post

62443220
>turning money into more money is bad
Okay zoomer go back to /r/communism

62443224
>I built shit and made millions in 20s and 30s. It was only when I had over $5M liquid did I start putting my money in the markets.
sure you did bro
this is just another vague "go make a business bro and make millions bro" post that is completely useless

The vast majority of people do not have the connections or the disposable cash to do anything but work and invest for decades

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62443227
>>62443220
>gurgles late stage capitalist ballz

62443240
Correct, I've said it many times, sometimes on here as well but I just get slated by low IQ browns who cannot fathom the concept.

62443241
Why do you still type like a retarded teenager when you're pushing 40? Why do you still waste time on a dead shit board like /biz/ when you're a millionaire? You're almost definitely larping, but even if you aren't you're still obviously a huge faggot.

62443248
>>62443208
>There is no point investing in the stock market if you dont already have a lot of money
True.
>Im almost 40. I built shit and made millions in 20s and 30s.
> It was only when I had over $5M liquid did I start putting my money in the markets.
Agree, this is the right approach.
Unless you are math wizard , or Risk Tolerant and can stand a risk of loosing half of your money.
>in which case you are playing the market casino and can beat the casino
>or know that casino employs bots , scammers and math geniuses to beat you
>or you know you are betting against brown/ jeet / other scammers.

This. you need to invest in YOURSELF first.
Which means - you need to live somewhere, a house. a security stockpile that would allow you to not work for 12 months.

62443253
>>62443208
Demoralization thread
Fuck off Jew

item.title: I really want BSV to go to 10,000 per coin. — 10 replies — 9.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
I really want BSV to go to 10,000 per coin.

Open thread • Replies: 10 • Updated: 2026-07-03 20:26 UTC

OP

I really want BSV to go to 10,000 per coin.

Early replies (first 3)

62440747
you want it to? thats like wanting nigeria to be in the top 10 most economical nations in the world. you're psychotic, ask your doctor for abilify.

62440806
>>62440647

You could've just bought Bitcoin, instead of pretending there are any real competitors.

62440815
>>62440647
Thank you for being a soldier anon. Your contribution is noted.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62440826
>>62440815
It to this day blows my mind how anyone could be trusting or believing anything a preposterous poser like that claims.

62440850
I've waited for 8 years. I am desolate

62440931
>>62440647
>>62440850
>>62440850
Do you genuinely believe that Craig Wright is Satoshi?

62440941
>>62440647
Yeah and I really want to win the mega millions lottery.

62441391
>>62440931
Yes, I do. All you really need is 1 satoshi though. Then your lender or bank can issue a balance to that satoshi along with various levels of identification, deeds, titles, etc. The satoshi you hold will operate like an NFT with all your personal data and accounts stored onchain. The banks will have contracts with counterparty miners to process customer transactions. Some banks may even mine their own transactions, if they win one block once a week or so they can settle every transaction for the week in one block. SPV ensures we can operate as if the transaction has completely settled, so the settlement can happen at a later date.

62442434
>>62440647
>>62440826
>>62440850
>>62440931
>>62441391
I'm satoshi nakamoto you dumb fucks

62443695
>>62442434
Ok tranny

item.title: . How do you plan to feed your kid when AI competition brings your wages way, way down? Do you have enough capital saved… — 2 replies — 8.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
. How do you plan to feed your kid when AI competition brings your wages way, way down? Do you have enough capital saved…

Open thread • Replies: 2 • Updated: 2026-07-03 21:26 UTC

OP

Serious question. How do you plan to feed your kid when AI competition brings your wages way, way down? Do you have enough capital saved to let him muddle through the next 70-80 years of his life? Or are you planning to relocate to a remote African country and take on a new job serving the farmers there? What is your game plan? Please don't say UBI. We both know that's a fairy tale.

Early replies (first 3)

62443843
>>62443827
kid? Imagine cumming in some foid stinkhole eww

62443858
>>62443827
AI will change some industries, yes. But it is not the thing that can replace any job. AI regulary tells me things that are wrong. Its trained with midwit internet reddit and wikipedia. The elites desire to replace us with AI, but it wont work. Just like intensification 90 didnt work.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.

item.title: /smg/ - stock market genera — 399 replies — 289.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
/smg/ - stock market genera

Open thread • Replies: 399 • Updated: 2026-07-03 20:07 UTC

OP

Believe edition

>Educational sites:
https://www.investopedia.com

>Financial TV Streams:
https://www.newslive.com/american/cnbc.html
https://www.livestreamy.net/bloomberg/

>Charts:
https://www.tradingview.com
https://www.finscreener.com
https://www.portfoliovisualizer.com

>Screeners:
https://finviz.com/
https://etfdb.com/

>Gambling:
https://www.optionsplaybook.com/options-introduction/
https://www.optionsprofitcalculator.com
https://optionstrat.com/
https://www.optionistics.com/quotes/option-prices

>Pre-Market and Live data:
https://www.investing.com/indices/indices-futures
https://finance.yahoo.com/

>Calendars:
https://www.marketwatch.com/economy-politics/calendar
https://www.earningswhispers.com/calendar
https://www.cmegroup.com/trading/interest-rates/countdown-to-fomc.html
https://www.mortgagenewsdaily.com/data/building-permits

>Boomer Investing 101:
https://www.bogleheads.org/wiki/Getting_started
https://www.sec.gov/search-filings

>Misc:
https://www.financialjuice.com/home
https://finance.yahoo.com/trending-tickers
https://market24hclock.com/
https://www.dividendchannel.com/drip-returns-calculator
https://brokerchooser.com/
https://www.chathamfinancial.com/technology/us-market-rates

>Previous:
>>62440882

Early replies (first 3)

62441894
OH MY FUCKING GOD
MY FIRST SHORT, ON MEMORY
IS THIS REAL

62441896
Various stocks have massive issues. K1, PFIC, or Collectable taxation. What a headache. On that note I want to double check, GDXU, GDX, SILJ, and SIL are safe right? I don't want a headache from these ETFs.

>>62441443
Uhh what, how???

>>62441714
Hmm a very curious situation, big groups have to choose between
>pump it so Michael Burry loses, but retail gets wealthy
>dump it so retail loses, but Michael Burry finally wins a new big short

62441898
did you guys have a good pride month?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62442944
>>62442918
>anthropic
Didn't hear about the delay
>openAI
If that company was doing so poorly, wouldn't they want to IPO as soon as possible to gain exit liquidity?
>meta
That's pretty ambiguous, I don't think they've claimed to have cancelled order or anything, just that they'll start selling excess compute, which is a way to compete with other providers in new space and way to gain some liquidity/revenue stream, but I'm not sure anyone really knows what Meta's trying to do here. Unless they're scaling down their buildout, then it doesn't mean much
>MSFT
Not sure how that's related negatively to AI, it's just another normal layoff. If anything these tend to be people laid off and planned to be replace by AI.
>Apple
Tim Cook is getting squeezed for once and is mad. Not all too sure whether he'll even get his china chips. They'll just shift the price increase to customer that will eat it up
>>62442920
>why would you buy cheap thing
Why won't you just want and buy it when it becomes inevitably cheaper the next trading day? I don't get it. If the demand just got destroyed, shouldn't semis crash now?

62442953
>>62442944

you "direction brain" its an NPC disease that's really common

>line go up thing good
>line go down thing bad
>buy good thing expensive
>sell cheap thing bad

I'm not saying chips are going to 0 dude. I'm saying they were expensive/overpriced and you are supposed to buy them when they are cheap instead of bagholding as exit liquidity after you buy the exact top of parabolic hype bullshit

QCOM is what I'm most interested in buying. I had a nice stack of it Friday and it pumped too hard at close so I sold it. I'll rebuy it if it goes lower.

62442956
>>62442953

I keep saying Friday because I don't live in the real world and don't even know what day it is. I meant thursday but my brain thinks it was Friday since markets closed today

62442961
>>62442932
You're a little late

>>62442924
>chips are definitely going to pull back
the mother of all dumps coming monday
we kept it flat for americas birthday, but that will only make bobo coom 3x as hard.

62442964
>>62442837
They do give out infinite margin. Just buy the stocks that go up and don't buy the ones that go down. Boom. Margin go up. Just never be wrong. It's that simple.

62442969
>>62442961
Yeah I know I'm fairly late into it. Though if we really think about it, the oil consequences haven't really hit yet. And I'm thinking about holding this for a year or more.
Memory and chips just seems really fucking scary now so I wasn't sure where else I'd put my money in. I was in EU def for a long time but that is also a fucking pitfall.

62442971
>>62442953
>I'm not saying chips are going to 0 dude. I'm saying they were expensive/overpriced and you are supposed to buy them when they are cheap instead of bagholding as exit liquidity after you buy the exact top of parabolic hype bullshit
Agreed. That's why you buy, hold and then offload bags in couple of quarters.

Though if you think that demand has been clearly destroyed in last 2 weeks, shouldn't the market reflect that and keep dumping semis?

62442976
>>62442971

>shouldn't the market reflect it

it did? everything got fucking obliterated

>why would you buy QCOM at a low
because its under 20 p/e, like 3% div a solid value play and its narrative wasn't some jeet saying "line go infinity we moon apes strong"

62442978
>>62442971
the market is forward looking. the reason for the dumps is everyone's nervous and trying to be the first one out the door before the first less than perfect earnings print. it could be another 6 to 12 months before we get something like that though.

62442985
>>62442953
>buy the least expensive luxury good
You should know from your own personal life that this is how you get raped.

62442987
>>62442985

I actually sell luxury goods to faggots. I would never would buy them. I have like 400 purses in a pile in the floor right now and my phone just gives me alerts all day long of stupid goys spending money for them

62443008
Ironic stuff.

62443014
It's 87° in my house rn

62443017
>>62443008
Wonder if they'll put some sacrificial lamb in a cell and call it a day. The big fish didn't get jailed for fucking kids or crypto rugpulls and they won't sit for this either.

62443019
>>62443008

62443020
>>62443008
Kek, after distorting the market with their jewish treasury Scotty Bussy tricks, now they're going full commie chasing after refiners. Basically blaming refiner for the shit that retarded administration engineered. All to preemptively redirect the blame for what is about to happen.
Lmao.
They're panicking up there. And if they panic, you should too.

62443023
IM SO FUCKING BORED OPEN THE CASINO BACK UP

REEEEE!!!!!!!!!!

62443026
>>62443023
Aren't futures still open or is that only in the EU?

62443028
>>62443023
Go work out.

62443031
>>62442987
Well then you should know that while its all some sort of noncery, buying the cheapest luxury brand is the heaviest raping where its literally just the name and probably a bigger piece of shit than you could get from Alibaba.

If you're going to buy luxury which you should do rarely, it should be actual luxury.

In the same way, the cheapo chip stock is probably a literal piece of shit thats up solely because its a chip stock.

Its not a "value" play any more than a boring black Michael Coors bag made by Thai slaves for $3 is.
At least with LV or Gucci or something you might get a cool design and have it made by thai slaves that have been imported to italy.

62443032
>>62443026
If I can't say trade my life savings on 0dtes then it ain't worth it
>>62443028
Cope

62443033
Silver

62443038
there is not a single rain cloud in the sky and there's lightning strikes, some close. this is crazy i've never seen this

62443042
>>62443032
>0dtes
based

62443045
>>62443038
Cloudless lightning is very potent and long-range, don't be standing out in a filed or something that would make you a lightning rod. The record holder is 515 miles long and went across 3 states.

62443049
>>62443047
>>62443047
>>62443047

62443058
>>62443020

There’s definitely a whiff of panic in the air now. The refiners on the west coast are running at running very hot at about 98% utilisation. About 90% of the east coast. So the US isn’t just exporting its SPR reserves to support the world. It’s having to run refineries for gas, diesel and the rest with NO cushion for a hurricane or outage. The loss of not just gulf oil is being felt. It’s the gulf REFINING CAPACITY.

So it’s a double countdown. It seems like the market stain will become undeniable in 1-3 weeks. And if there’s any sort of refinery capacity outage (they happen that’s why they keep spare capacity). Then it will happen fast.

62443101
>>62443008
>>62443019

they told you oil prices would come down and you laughed at them and now you are surprised its all fake and gay. I don't know why you guys try to actively fight against something you know is fake and retarded. oil is going to be cheaper than it was before the war even with the strait closed while you guys blow up your gambling account and act confused.

they can make the price of paper oil fucking negative if they want lmao.

>>62443031
>cheapo stock pick is a shitcoin

I mean I gamble on companies that are like 500B+ market cap. none of them are going to pack up in the middle of the night and ghost like Enron (probably)

62443655
>>62442745
love all these retards who think bear market after several a red day when we bounce back right up

item.title: UNDER $10K NET WORTH THREAD #1 — 199 replies — 46.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
UNDER $10K NET WORTH THREAD #1

Open thread • Replies: 199 • Updated: 2026-07-03 17:11 UTC

OP

Brothers,

SpaceX has begun to rise. Its success or fall is of little importance to us in the short term.

In the meanwhile we must devise ways to gain a spot at the table with our kin in the six figure club.

I for one propose we spend our time learning a subject. Knowledge is the greatest wealth of all.

However, I would be remiss to not tell the truth that I haven't a clue what we should study.

So instead I suggest we create an eggregore for these threads. Others made monero-chan, bobo and sminem

I am thinking we create one based on a girl who would be willing to believe in us while we are poor and brave the pain throughout having to witness our more disappointing moments of action. Never losing faith in us, she is always there. Yes. This is how we shall spend our time.

At any rate, that is my suggestion for tonight's fun. I have to work in the morning so let's not get too rowdy. Take it or leave it. If you will take it, then be sure to double it and pass it on to the next anon.

Let us commence the general!

Come one, come all!

Early replies (first 3)

62373772
>>62373752
Jannies will surely delete these threads. Instead of creating an eggregore why not try something new and usurp an old one. It may be a derivative of one which has already been made.

62373798
>>62373772
Hello anon thanks for joining. You are poster #1. Your anime image shall be the eggregore. The "coffee" in the image is rather a good omen. We all know images with hot girls accompanied by a brief post on coffee attracts all the attention.

Now that matter is settled, help me add some links to this post here. This will be the header for the start of each general

Helpful links

>Educational materials
https://w9.kaijimanga.com/

>Looking to try the TCG route?
https://youtube.com/@alphainvestments69?si=tDAPjnRSZhyCIGP5

>Lost all hope?
https://www.indeed.com/


>Hidden in plain sight
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Limitless_(film)

>Games to strengthen you financial acumen
https://mahjongsoul.yo-star.com/

>Learn your from your betters
https://ia600609.us.archive.org/3/items/the-house-of-rothschild-ferguson-niall/The%20House%20of%20Rothschild%20-%20Ferguson%2C%20Niall.pdf
What is the name of that character in your post?

62373799
>>62373772
verily, a true fact

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62423064
Good to see the thread is still going strong. Today is my off day, let's look into the next subject "predictive programming"

We'll start with Oliver tree

62425537
op was not a fag this thread has good vibes we should keep it going until we all make it
personally im trading perps with a system after 10 years of learning charts off/on but finally committing
did a 32x in 2021 and should have been able to retire but didnt anticipate the biden years so here we are going pure psycho mode like we did back then but even harder until money is /solved/, then I'll keep trading for the love of the game cuz it's the best sport in the world

62425849
>>62423064
This shit is way too schizo. No anon you can not predict the future. You can maybe foresee some type of market trends, seasonality or whatever but this is just ridiculous

62425890
>>62425537
Got any good tips/ressources on learning to trade charts? trying to get into it too

62427228
>>62425849
I concede. I'll look for a more productive venture but I won't let the thread or general die, it will be some time before value is struck, I will admit that. I can be tenacious if nothing else.

62428130
>>62425890
emperorBTC's telegram has a basic bitch tldr set of material to learn from. also has a youtube where he goes over stuff. that's where I started and I like that he focuses on the absolute basics, although he leans heavily towards confirmation w/ volume which others may disagree with. btc focused but btc/crypto is perhaps the most effective use of TA.
basically there's no need to get fancy and the chart is the final source of truth because what the price does > what people cope and/or seethe about
support/resistance levels and price action with risk management (defined r:r) = compound as you get gud
once you commit you'll realize "the catch" on people actually make money from trading is is simply how retarded the overwhelming majority of people are that they simply cannot manage a few simple tenets to click buttons and make money, you likely being one of them if you don't develop a process and risk too much on trades
gl anon

62428141
>>62428130
also perps have exploded so trading equities for crypto natives has been a pleasure to avoid tradfi gatekeeping bs
follow the right people on twatter with alerts set to on and it's like having multiple research firms giving alpha for free-- key word "right" accounts. hopefully you have the pattern recognition to figure out which are spewing paid channel larps and which are providing genuine insight
that's basically the whole game. if you can get into a group chat with other chads that's even better because a network is stronger than you alone, although this is def an arena where it ultimately comes down to you mastering yourself (you can't copy trade your way to wealth but you can learn what others do/how they enter/exit positions)
legend trade is a new perps platform that's gamifying this if you wanna start there instead of hyperliquid (front-end using hyperliquid)
Also bigtrout300 on twitter and join his tg as well he's pretty dope. There's a lot of great accounts posting good shit right now. Some really good posters fade in/out of cycles while the scammers/extractors are always abundant, but just use discretion

62428170
>pic related
>"...focus on the chart as these information is very likely to be priced in already"
the "TA is astrology for men" line is used to make fun of retards who take it too far and treat it like divination when in reality it's all stacking probabilities/confluence in your favor as best you can, and from the above example you can see relying on your feed for information will almost always be slower than the chart

62428488
Finally some good posts

62428503
>>62428141
Big trout doesn't post on Twitter and his TG hasn't had activity since May. Any other suggestions?

62428780
>>62428503
His tg is BigTroutTrade and he posts on twitter all the time wdym

62428797
>>62428780
BigTrout Trading on youtube as well

other X goats that have been killing it IMO recently:
@MoneyPrinter0x
and my personal favorite currently:
@Wild_Randomness

there's tons of alpha just follow those people, then see what they repost, then follow the people they interact with that provide research, and even or especially follow the chinese/korean/japanese accounts that post comprehensive semiconductor/other market effort posts since translation is seamless now
never been a better time to go full NEET

62429207
>>62428797
But you're still under $10k?

62429246
>>62378965
Anon Belgium is literally doing very well in the world cup, you should make more of these predictions

62431586
bump.

62431599
probably nothing
bio protocol desci ai BIO now cookin with open ai, nvidia, anthropic, claude news check twita

62432055
>>62373752
Hey
I just started out in this crypto thing and bought $450 worth of solana. How do I become cool and multiply it

62432088
>>62432055
Be like me and listen to people within a group of other retards that are pushing a token. The last one tanked a $200 investment -98% but then he re-deployed the same token and it yielded a 40x from where it was called.

62432306
>>62432088
pardon my incompetence but I didn't understand much of what you just wrote anon

62432350
>>62428797
I had bad experiences following twitter people and waiting for signals even those that seem smart. It can be interesting but you’ll be lost if they randomly stop posting, they’re not funds giving you alpha but people that should have better things to do than post if their full job is actually trading.

I do still like @donalt and @cryptocred their show technical roundup is a rare non clickbaity show that just focuses on TA but most people are inherently frauds on social media

62432360
>>62432055
I don’t think Solana is a good buy right now it’s barely holding support and likely going lower to like 40 if I remember correctly

>>62432088
If you have a group like that be a hero to the community and share it to us

62432373
>>62432360
>be a hero to the community and share it to us
see
>>62385756
I recently held an airdrop for /biz/ too

https://warosu.org/biz/thread/62424715

62434369
Bump, I'm getting an early weekend because of the country's birthday. Will devote time to this thread.

62435112
>>62432350
skill issue. donalt? lol
you gotta follow the small accounts anon

62436077
>>62435112
Why would you rely on random accounts calls and not build the skill yourself? You are just fucked if you only listen to others, and you have no way to know they aren’t just lucky for a while until they drag you down with themselves

>donalt
Yes he may be old and washed but you can still learn a lot from two traders that never shilled some memecoin. Except for ftx but I guess everyone had an ftx sponsorship for a while

62436265
>UNDER $10K NET WORTH THREAD
>200 REPLIES

LMAOOOOOOOOOOOOOO OH NO NO NO NO AAAAAAAHHHHHH

62437580
>>62436077
did you read my first post? i literally said not to just blindly copy trade
there's nothing wrong with using great traders as confluence

62440778
bamp.

62442413
Bump

62443230
Man i wanna move to SLC someday

item.title: >if my 22 year old son is still living at home , I don’t him paying rent, I want him OUT — 73 replies — 35.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
>if my 22 year old son is still living at home , I don’t him paying rent, I want him OUT

Open thread • Replies: 73 • Updated: 2026-07-03 19:24 UTC

OP

>if my 22 year old son is still living at home , I don’t him paying rent, I want him OUT

Early replies (first 3)

62433628
But saaaaaar isnt this normal in india and all civilized places? Only in the so called united states of america they kick their kids out

62433637
>>62433628
anything that isnt jewish is indian because.... because it just is, okay!!!!

62433641
All you need is a half million dollar down payment and you can get your mortgage payment down to $4,250 per month on your loan against a million dollar house. Then you can live in the desert on top of your neighbors with trees that will fall over during the first rains and slight breeze because they don't belong in a desert.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62441264
>>62438159
I'm happy he didn't ruin their lives.

62441268
>>62436914
Everyone with this mentality is going to be removed from the gene pool. That is your bootstraps.

62441344
The weirdest thing about this board are mindbroken losers like defending boomers for the keks and lels.

62441345
>>62441264
>give like no one else
But not to your kids!

62441355
>>62441345
You can't read

62441358
>>62441344
Call your uncle back you little whiny brat.

62441547
>>62433637
I was referring to his grammar.

62441559
>>62433626
Boomers are entitled to this piece of land. There is nothing you can do about it.
You own nothing you happy.

62442042
>>62441268
These retards (a LARPer, obviously, but there are people who genuinely believe this shit) don't realize that their kids are competing with someone who's parents are professionals from Nigeria, Syria, or some other 3rd World shithole hell-bent on their kids having a better life than they had, who will do everything to ensure they start out on third base, while you're keeping your kid in the on-deck circle.

62442046
>>62442042
>professionals from Nigeria, Syria, or some other 3rd World shithole
And you can bet they're not going to spend their retirement (and their kids' inheritance) going on cruises or pursuing other boomer money-sinks, probably viewing themselves as a failure if they don't leave their kids the biggest inheritance they can.

62442134
>>62442046
Yes, Nigerians are well known globally for their fiscal responsibility and sense of duty.

62442194
in my early 20s my dad told me that he was not going to support me from here on out, and that i needed to become totally independent. he made it abundantly clear, i was totally on my own.

so i said okay, and i spent my 20s basically grinding in college with basically zero support from him. i took on student loans, pursued a stem degree, got internships, i spent dozens of hours a week studying- with no social life. after all, why would i party, date, or make friends in college when those would, objectively speaking, only distract from my coursework? which would, objectively speaking, run the risk of imperiling my career prospects and financial future? in other words, why would i take on frivolous social activities when i had no fallback plan in case i got bad grades or dropped out of stem? i determined a social life was not a risk worth taking, since there was no backup plan available to me.

so i had the most boring college experience possible and now 5 years after college, i make very decent money in a technical field. but instead of playing golf or pickleball or ultimate frisbee in boater shoes like my country club attending WASP-y peers do, i just emulate games from the 2000s (currently playing monster hunter dos) in my pajamas and spend all my spare income trading risky leveraged positions for extra money. because i am basically disillusioned and have no interest in spending any money in hobbies, and i just want to retire as soon as possible. because my life since college has been nothing but grinding, when i work i grind, when i daytrade i grind. so i want to retire as quickly as possible so i get to relax.

my dad has recently started to call me, almost frantic, aggressively asking me why i'm not pursuing a relationship, a wife, a family, and so on. and i really don't know how to explain he basically did everything in his power to create the situation he is not happy with.

62442314
>>62433626
I'm still paying m onthly child support for a 24 year old becaus ethey are in full time education. Just found out this week that they are now doing a masters. I had been looking forward to being emancipated from this, not so much the giving money to my child but having to send it to someone who cheated on me 20 years ago and make the divorce a 10 year long waste of life.

What do I think of this generation that feels they can live off their parents forever? Well I started workinng at 16 and living on my own at 17 (very menial work, cleaning nightclub bathrooms) but as a child I worked beside my father herding farm animals and feeding them every day. My child has never lifted a finger to help me with anything and has in their entire life only worked three months half shift in a shop and walked out of that job because they were asked to mop a floor.

So what are the consequences? Well I am leaving my child nothing in my will but to my fathers relatives. They won't be expecting that but I have never seen that child show the slightest respect for my families heritage or me.

What do I think of zoomers/milennials in general? People like OP? Guess. I don't give a fuck about them and no one should.

62442325
>>62441344
The real losers we met along the way was (you). Pathetic lazy gambling addicts who sat scratching their arses doing pointless degrees and farting on about 'making it'

62442338
>>62442194
You're asw much of a failure as a son as you are as a human being. Fairly typical for a generation to spend a decade on the internet denigrating their parents who wiped their arses and fed them and read them bedtime stories, birthday presents, christmas presents, books, toys, dental etc etc. .

I hope your father disinheirits you you self pitying bum, it is all you deserve. Why should he be loyal to you when you have zero loyalty to him? You're a sickening waste of oxygen.

62442364
>>62441222
At a point where every dollar charged means they'll have to pay 2 back to some kike bank.
You can teach that without ruining their start. I started when my daughter was 6 and soon my son will follow: gamified everything, wooden money, savings, deposits, inflation, volume discounts, etc. In a few years we'll be using real markets. And we'll outkike the kikes if needs be, but they're starting their adulthood debt-free provided they grow up responsible. If they waste it then I may change my mind, I guess I'll have to supervise their finance a bit until they convince me they know how to play the game and understand money.

62442389
>>62442338
im not ungrateful to my father at all. you seem to be totally misunderstanding. i am perfectly content with the outcome. i simply reacted to the events in front of me in the ways that made sense with the information i had at the time.

what my post pointa out, i am unsure of how to articulate the idea to my father, who is not happy. "if you wanted a socialite son with WASP-y hobbies and a fiance cut from the same cloth, you probably would have wanted to financially support your son when it mattered - because all the pickleball playing frat bros names Brayden at the country club with picturesque wedding photos , literally all of them, graduated with a 2.1 GPA in business and got their jobs through nepotism". there are no frat bros in boater shoes playing ultimate frisbee whos dads refuse to support them. it doesnt exist.

now, i am not entitled to financial support. just like my dad isnt entitled to grandkids. but these two things are related, even if you want to throw a tantrum and be vulgar. it changes nothing

you seem to be confused and upset. try to detach a bit from your heightened emotional state

62442391
>>62442389

62442419
>>62442346
Let's take it easy and look first into the mirror before judging others. Not everyone is fit to be a parent. Hopefully your child inherits a good stepfather, which would be a better outcome than inheriting your will.

62442422
>>62442391
what i am trying to articulate in my post might require an IQ of 110 to maybe process. because its slightly nuanced. but its really not that complicated, fundamentally.

my dad wanted a WASP-y son who had fratbro hobbies and a kind of upper class lifestyle. golf, wedding photos, friend group of likeminded frat bros who go to sports games and go out drinking together. but my dad was convinced by talking heads like buffet and ramsey that any financial support for your kids after their early 20s is wrong. so he took that advice and cut off all support. and i, having no support in college, basically had to learn totally by myself how to function and rely on just myself - to the point of becoming self reliant, at the cost of having no appetite for frivolous spending, luxury, or expensive/high maintenance relationships once i entered the workforce. understand- i am not complaining whatsoever, i am just saying, if you want a preppy rich kid socialite son with a hot high maintenance girlfriend, youre probably gonna need to get him a job. if you dont want to because that will spoil him or whatever, thats perfectly fine, just dont be surprised when he finds his own financial advice (eg sam hyde lol), like you found yours, and he decides to go full hermitmaxx mode and he daytrades with his paychecks instead of buying golf clubs or a saving up for an annual trip to europe for his high maintenance hot gf

does this make any sense? am i crazy here?

62442430
>>62442422

son you need to go MAKE SOMETHING of yourself

62442437
>>62442422
Your father is wrong to dictate the life he wants you to live. You are meant to bond with your parents if you both have a good relationship, sometimes helping each other if possible and within reason. Never burden a child like that.

62443265
>>62442989
Dads who want to control the lives of their kids without supporting them are just delusional retards as evidenced by the lashing out in response to those posts.

If my boss wants me to do work for him, he pays me. If a business wants me to try their product, they give me incentives for a trial period. If daddy wants his son to live a certain way it's going to take more than a regal command. You wanted to teach your kid self reliance by kicking him out, right? Well now your kid doesn't rely on you and has zero obligation to follow your desired path. Mission accomplished, you successfully removed yourself from having influence.
